creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 172250
Proposed patch (since 416829 revision)

As you know, the assimp was updated to 3.3.1 version (after fixing of 940 issue):
https://github.com/assimp/assimp/releases/tag/v3.3.1
https://github.com/assimp/assimp/compare/v3.2...v3.3.1

The patch is trivial, with following (possible) changes:
- Remove BOOST option and add compiler:c++11-lang to USES
- Remove patch for pstdint.h file, which fixed by upstream
- Adapt pkg-plist
